entries.note: V61-A reuses the shipped V60 continuation surfaces by default.
V61-A is limited to the exact resident /urm/copilot/send seam only.
V61-A requires explicit source-principal and speaker typing on ingress.
V61-A keeps the surface-authority descriptor distinct from ingress interpretation.
V61-A keeps charter_amendment_candidate posture-only and non-mutating.
V61-A defers bridge-office binding and rewitness to V61-B.
V61-A keeps governed egress posture-only, non-authorizing, and non-witnessing by default.
V61-A keeps evidence from the selected resident send seam non-generalizing by default.
